title: Inklet
move_pattern: Standard Inklet starts with Jab, middle Inklet starts with Whirlwind. After Jab: randomly pick Piercing Gaze or Whirlwind (neither can repeat consecutively). After Piercing Gaze or Whirlwind: Jab, then back to random.
notes: The MiddleInklet property changes starting move to Whirlwind. Slippery Power is applied on spawn. The WHIRLWIND_MOVE loc key maps to 'Windup Punch' title.
